item.title:

Pounding Poet wins the CPMS Novices' Champion Handicap Chas
item.description:
ITV Racing @itvracing · 1min Travelled well, produced well!
Pounding Poet wins the CPMS Novices' Champion Handicap Chase

item.title: RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 12min We recently went to see Randox Grand National winner Noble Yeats, and spoke to Sam Waley-Coh
